ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Broader economic sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock company */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stock traded on that date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source where the price data was obtained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the price data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., performance, trend analysis) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for generating the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the script or user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required to access the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the data source was checked for updates */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Any error messages encountered during the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
